prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-CCSPW2XMPO5-BUN-5PK-PZ-AMZ Product Type: MAGNIFIER Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: (LOT OF 5) Universal Credit Card Wallet Pocket 2x Magnifier Description: This credit card shaped magnifier fits in your wallet and is made of a durable plastic with a fresnel lens (a thin, light, lens that is flat on one side and ridged on the other).

The Magnifier will fit in almost any wallet and any purse. Be prepared to read small print on the go. Search Terms: plastic fresnel lens pocket sized Features: - Flat, small, sturdy and lightweight - Fits in a wallet or pocketbook - Magnification: 2x - Material: Plastic - Dimension Length : 3.25" x 2" (LW) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 5-Pk Universal Credit Card Wallet Pocket Magnifier

tokens.name: Universal Credit Card Wallet Pocket Magnifier

anthropic.title_differentiation: 2X Magnification, Fresnel Lens, Pocket Sized, Fits Wallet, Lightweight Plastic

openai.title_differentiation: 2X Magnification, Credit Card Size, Durable Plastic, Fresnel Lens, Fits Wallet Or Pocketbook, Lightweight, Portable
